title: Quiz 1
description: This quiz tests your knowledge of variables, functions, if expressions, and primitive types (Chapters 1-6).
instructions: Fix all the issues in this program that combines concepts from the first several chapters.
hints: The function is missing an `else` branch for quantities <= 40.
When quantity > 40, price is quantity (1 cent each). When <= 40, price is quantity * 2.
explanation: This quiz combines functions, if/else expressions, and return values. When an `if` is used as an expression (for the return value), all branches must return the same type, and you must handle all cases. The function uses bulk pricing: more than 40 apples cost 1 cent each, otherwise 2 cents each.
